name: Loni Love
bio: Loni Love is an American stand-up comedian, television host, and author who left a career as an electrical engineer to pursue comedy in the early 2000s. A Star Search runner-up named among Comedy Central and Variety's comics to watch, she released the Comedy Central special America's Sister in 2010. She later became an Emmy-winning co-host of the daytime talk show The Real.

timeline.ev: Runner-up on Star Search; wins US Comedy Arts Festival jury prize
Comedy Central Presents half-hour special airs
One-hour Comedy Central special America's Sister airs
Begins co-hosting the talk show The Real
Wins Daytime Emmy with The Real hosting team

accolades: Daytime Emmy Award winner as co-host of The Real (2018)
Jury Prize for best stand-up at the US Comedy Arts Festival (2003)
Named among Variety and Comedy Central Top 10 Comics to Watch (2009)
